text:
On 14.09.12 06:33, Jason Helfman wrote:

> Fetching the new distfile seems to be problematic. Are you seeing anything
> that would indicate an issue?

Yes, my server is currently hammered by thousands of misguided
bittorrent users. I've reconfigured it, now it should be serving the tar
ball again.

Regards,

  erdgeist
